#Set Up Of CI Workflow

name: Checking condition

on: [push]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up python
        uses: actions/setup-python
 	with:
	  python-version: "3.10"

      - name: Run test
	run: python CI-1.py
